summary: PR 2727 cleaned up the item material class object by renaming the global data symbol at 0x803F1F90 from address-style it_803F1F90 to it_mobj, tightening the it_MObjInfo struct to real class data, moving string literals out of the struct initializer into call sites, replacing raw __assert uses with HSD_ASSERT, and updating callers and symbols accordingly.

key_files.role: Primary cleanup target; renamed it_803F1F90 to it_mobj, trimmed struct fields, added class helper include, used HSD_CLASS_INFO, used sizeof arguments, converted stored report/assert strings to inline OSReport strings plus HSD_ASSERT, and changed setup function typing.
Header surface updated for the renamed global and added the it_MObjSetupFunc typedef used by it_MObjInfo.
Callsite updated to pass &it_mobj to hsdChangeClass instead of &it_803F1F90.
Symbol map updated: it_803F1F90 became it_mobj at .data:0x803F1F90 with size reduced from 0x150 to 0xDC, and former embedded strings became local string symbols.

what_changed.text: Renamed the global item material class-info object from it_803F1F90 to it_mobj and updated the extern declaration and item.c use site.
Removed string storage fields from struct it_MObjInfo: library_name, report_fmt_no_register, assert_file, and report_fmt_no_register_2 no longer live inside the class-info struct.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itmaterial.c struct it_MObjInfo field removal

what_changed.text: Moved the it_mobj initializer near the struct definition and kept only actual class/template data in the initializer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itmaterial.c added struct it_MObjInfo it_mobj initializer
raw_diff: itmaterial.c removed bottom struct it_803F1F90 initializer

what_changed.text: Changed class initialization to use HSD_CLASS_INFO(&it_mobj), HSD_CLASS_INFO(&hsdMObj), string literals for library and class names, and sizeof(HSD_MObjInfo)/sizeof(HSD_MObj) instead of struct fields and numeric sizes.
Replaced direct __assert(info->assert_file, line, "0") with HSD_ASSERT(line, 0), while preserving OSReport calls with inline message literals.
Changed numeric TEV enable/disable initializer values 1 and 0 to GX_ENABLE and GX_DISABLE.
The PR included a bot issue comment reporting 'No changes' for GALE01 between base f59b5e0 and head 25eea9a.

smart_moves.text: The cleanup separated real struct-owned class data from ordinary strings by removing embedded string fields and using string literals at the hsdInitClassInfo, OSReport, and HSD_ASSERT call sites.
The renamed global it_mobj is backed by the symbol map at the same address, so call sites no longer need an opaque address-style name for a known material object class.
Using HSD_CLASS_INFO and sizeof arguments made the class initialization more type-directed and less dependent on raw nested-field addresses and magic sizes.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered class-info struct appears to include report strings or assert file names after the real template/class fields, verify whether those strings are actually separate local data rather than struct members.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt size changed from 0x150 to 0xDC and local strings added

decomp_lessons.lesson: For plain generated assertions with an identifiable source line, HSD_ASSERT(line, 0) can replace __assert(file, line, "0") while report side effects remain as OSReport calls.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_80278108 replaced __assert with HSD_ASSERT(0x144, 0) and HSD_ASSERT(0x152, 0)

decomp_lessons.lesson: If a data object has a supported semantic role and the symbol map is updated at the same address, a semantic global name can improve callsite readability over an address-style name.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itmaterial.h extern struct it_MObjInfo it_mobj

naming_conventions.name: it_mobj
naming_conventions.meaning: Item material HSD_MObj class-info object at .data:0x803F1F90.

naming_conventions.name: it_MObjSetupFunc
naming_conventions.meaning: Setup callback type taking HSD_MObj*, rendermode, and unused u32 argument.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itmaterial.h typedef void (*it_MObjSetupFunc)(HSD_MObj* mobj, u32 rendermode, u32 unused)
raw_diff: struct it_MObjInfo setup field type

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Shrink the modeled data object to its real owned size and let former trailing literals be emitted as separate local string data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt size 0x150 -> 0xDC and new local string labels
raw_diff: itmaterial.c removed trailing string initializer members

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use named GX enum constants GX_ENABLE and GX_DISABLE instead of literal 1 and 0 in TEV descriptor initialization.
Use HSD_CLASS_INFO macro plus <baselib/class.h> when initializing class info, rather than taking nested parent field addresses directly.

searchable_terms: can't find free color ratio register
follow_up_queries: Find other class-info structs with trailing library_name, assert_file, or report_fmt fields that may really be separate literals.
Search for __assert(..., line, "0") in item material or baselib-adjacent code where HSD_ASSERT may be the source-level form.
Search for hsdInitClassInfo calls using raw parent field addresses or magic sizes instead of HSD_CLASS_INFO and sizeof.
Search for address-style item data globals whose class name string supports a semantic symbol name.

notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so intent beyond the diff is not inferred.
The diff directly supports the changed files, symbol rename, struct trimming, assert/report cleanup, and header updates.
The decomp-dev bot comment reports 'No changes' for GALE01, but no build logs or objdiff details are included in the slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Trailing strings after class-info fields may be separate local data, not struct members
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2727, it_MObjInfo dropped trailing string fields for library/report/assert text; symbols.txt correspondingly changed it_mobj at 0x803F1F90 from size 0x150 to 0xDC and listed the strings as local data. This is a reusable check for class-info data recovery.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt size and local string labels

accepted_candidate_records.title: Generated plain asserts can become HSD_ASSERT while keeping OSReport side effects
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2727 replaced __assert(info->assert_file, line, "0") with HSD_ASSERT(line, 0) and kept OSReport message calls as inline literals in it_80277F90 and it_80278108.

source_update_candidates.title: itmaterial.c owns it_mobj class-info data at 0x803F1F90
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2727 renamed the global at .data:0x803F1F90 from it_803F1F90 to it_mobj, modeled it as struct it_MObjInfo of size 0xDC, and treated following report/assert strings as separate local data rather than struct fields.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoped fact for future itmaterial data and class-info cleanup work; should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Check class-info trailing literals before modeling them as struct fields
source_update_candidates.text: When reconstructing HSD class-info-like globals, do not automatically include adjacent library/report/assert strings as struct fields; verify symbol size, field layout, and callsite usage. PR 2727 supports this as an example in itmaterial.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt it_mobj size 0xDC and local string labels
source_update_candidates.reason: This may be a useful specific example under existing literals/data ownership standards, but should not be promoted without curator review and cross-PR corroboration.

rejection_notes: No human review feedback was present, so no reviewer intent or requested changes are recorded.
The PR title says 'match' and the bot reported 'No changes', but the slice does not include detailed objdiff/build artifacts; matching tactics are therefore limited to what the diff itself shows.
